title: WizyMon
description: A simple modpack for a minecraft server who use Cobblemon 1.6!

The **WizyMon** modpack is made for the **WizyMon¬†server**! In this modpack you will find some required server mods¬†and new custom map for more exploration! The server is currently still working!

**Welcome to the official WizyMon Modpack** 
- This modpack adds a pleasant feeling to playing Cobblemon singleplayer or even on other Cobblemon servers, here you will find many mods needed for Cobblemon.
- Specially designed for the **WizyMon server**! This modpack offers you a complete Cobblemon experience, bringing together all the required server mods and a unique custom map for endless exploration!
